security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first meeting notes. Nothing leaves your machine.
bundle.longDescription: Open Granola captures meetings without a bot, transcribes on-device with Whisper, and enhances notes with a local LLM. No cloud, no accounts, no data retention.

info.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Open Granola captures your microphone to transcribe meetings on-device. Audio is never uploaded or stored by default.
info.NSSystemAudioUsageDescription: Open Granola captures system audio to transcribe meetings on-device. Audio is never uploaded or stored by default.
